caption:
300+ watches, 60+brands, vintage, neo-vintage, preloved watches, with affordable prices for every budget..
You can view our collection, everyday @The B1 Mall just behind Moe, Dubai 1:30-11:00PM
Tabby, Tamara, credit card, cash payment options.
www.mainspringdubai.com
#watch #vintage #vintagewatch #dubai #everyday

Buying a vintage watch should feel exciting, not uncertain.

At Mainspring, every piece is checked, serviced if needed, and explained — so you know exactly what you’re buying and why it’s worth it.

It’s simple: we want you to love your watch for years to come.

Whether you’re just starting your collection or adding your next favourite, you’ll find watches here that are honest, well-kept, and ready to wear.

Your personal guide to better watches,
Erkan😊

.
.
.
.
#watchesofinstagram #watchesoftheday #dubaiwatches #watchesformen #watchesforsale #watchesforher #vintagewatches

“What’s the best therapy for me?”

Easy answer…spending weekends at the flea market surrounded by my vintage timepieces, uncovering the history behind each watch and sharing those stories with fellow collectors. 

Every piece has its own character, memories, and journey through time — and that passion became Mainspring.dxb. I’d love for you to stop by and visit me at the flea market every weekend.

@dubaifleamarket
#vintagewatches #watchcollector #horology #fleafind #dubaiwatches

Bold Elegance

A curated selection where presence meets precision. From the unmistakable lines of the Bvlgari chronograph (full set) to the diamond-set Tag Heuer Formula 1(full set), the iconic Breitling SuperOcean Héritage , and the bold Breitling Chronomat(full set) — each piece carries its own character, history, and attitude. Timeless Swiss craftsmanship designed for collectors who appreciate more than just telling time.

Available through Mainspring.DXB — where vintage spirit meets modern luxury.

Tabby, Tamara, card and cash payment options.

#Bvlgari #Breitling #TagHeuer #SwissWatches #LuxuryWatch VintageWatch Chronograph WatchCollector WatchFam MainspringDXB DubaiWatches PrelovedLuxury BoldElegance WristCheck WatchCollection

Happy Eid to All !😊🎉🚀

Our shop in @The B1 Mall will be open during The Eid, between 01:30PM and 11:00PM as always. 

You can also shop online on www.mainspringdubai.com (free delivery within UAE).

This weekend's @dubaifleamarket schedule will be announced on thursday here.

See you and happy holidays!

#eidmubarak #watch #vintagewatch #fashion #vintage

Big love to @mainspring.dxb for recognising my style and trusting  me with these amazing pieces. More than just watches — each one carries its own story, and now I get to make them part of mine. 🙏🏽🖤
Can’t wait to style these properly. 🙂‍↕️
#fyp #mainspring #fashion #reels #explore

"Untouched vintage elegance with timeless character"
4 classic dress watches in never-used condition; 600dhs/each+VAT
3 months warranty, Tabby/Tamara, card or cash payment options.

#classicwatch #vintagewatch #quartzwatch #collector #vintage

Collecting vintage watches is more than a passion it’s an appreciation for timeless craftsmanship. 

We truly admire @mainspring.dxb for keeping the art and legacy of vintage timepieces alive. 

Visit their kiosk at #B1Mall and experience the magic for yourself.

جمع الساعات الكلاسيكية ليس مجرد شغف، بل تقدير للجمال الذي لا يفقد قيمته مع الزمن 
نحن نُقدّر حقًا @mainspring.dxb لحرصهم على إبقاء إرث الساعات الكلاسيكية وفخامتها حيّة حتى اليوم. 

زوروا منصّتهم في B1 Mall واكتشفوا هذا العالم المميز بأنفسكم

The Venezianico Nereide Corallo Automatic limited edition combines Swiss watchmaking precision with the natural beauty of red coral, making each dial truly one of a kind. 
Housed in a robust 42 mm steel case with a mirror finished bezel, it is powered by the reliable Sellita SW200 automatic movement. 
Its integrated steel bracelet ensures a seamless fit and contemporary style. 
182/500 limited.

Price : 4,100dhs+VAT

Warranty & Authenticity : 100% Authentic, 3 months movement warranty with store authenticity liability certificate.
Payment: Tabby, Tamara, card or cash.
View it in store @theb1mall in person or shop online on www.mainspringdubai.com
Free delivery in UAE.

#venezianico #italiandesign #swisswatch
